title: Sand Against Rubber
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on sand against rubber, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Sand Against Rubber. Luffy stays behind to fight Crocodile for the first time, learning the terrifying gap between resolve and a Warlord’s power. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: CLACK!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: VIV!! Wake up!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's coming for you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If you like your pirate-friends so much, then feel free to stay here with them.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: You can all become food for my bananas as this room sinks to the bottom of the lake.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll even bring that cheeky Mr. Prince here for you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I hope you'll be satisfied with just his corpse... Hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: GOD DAMN IT!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: M-Mr. Crocodile!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: H-have you heard about the incident at Nanohana!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hm? Ah yes, I have.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: With the rebels ready to clash against the Royal Army, the whole city-

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: No, I daresay the entire country is in an uproar!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well, considering how this country was ruled by a king who couldn't even be bothered to protect his own cities from pirate attacks,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Perhaps it`s not surprising that things have turned out the way they did...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Look, it's Crocodile...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're right! It's really him! How wonderful!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He rarely shows his face in the casino...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Crocodile!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: As popular as ever, aren't you...

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Sir Croco- dile!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Crocodile!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Hmph...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Viv!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So I can't just let them die here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Growl!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They've saved my life over and over again...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Aghhhh!

summary: This part develops sand against rubber and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
